task: Confirm `.manifests/current_role.json` names `engineer_planner` before using the seeded artifacts. Use the seeded benchmark handoff in `benchmark_definition.yaml` to plan a raised-shelf solution that uses one motorized lift axis and leaves a clean wiring corridor for downstream electronics work. Source any motorized COTS parts through the catalog, keep their exact pricing and provenance in the plan, treat the benchmark cost and weight values in `benchmark_definition.yaml` as hard customer caps, set tighter planner-owned budgets under those caps, and keep the mechanism manufacturable, sketch-aware, and robust to the listed runtime jitter.
expected_criteria: Requires `.manifests/current_role.json` to name `engineer_planner` and the seeded workspace to match that role. Writes contract-valid `plan.md`, `todo.md`, `assembly_definition.yaml`, and updated `benchmark_definition.yaml` for a raised-shelf transfer, with a feasible single-DOF lift strategy, cable-routing awareness, exact COTS motor provenance, sketching companion context kept aligned with the same geometry, and planner budgets below the benchmark caps.

The plan should handle the vertical drop cleanly, remain manufacturable, and stay within the benchmark cost and weight caps. Split variant for `ep-010`. Technical drawing mode: minimal.
expected_criteria: Requires `.manifests/current_role.json` to name `engineer_planner` and the seeded workspace to match that role. Planner artifacts define a gravity-aware lower-bin solution, include concrete risk mitigations for bounce and escape, and produce valid engineering handoff files under the benchmark caps. Split variant for `ep-010`. Technical drawing mode: minimal.
